_note: Manifest of the three benchmark datasets for the surrogate-architecture ablation study. CANONICAL LOCATION: Geothermal_Graph_Surrogate/ablation_datasets/ (see its README.md for stats, known properties, and figures). All three share byte-identical physics normalization. Objectives: graph_energy_total, graph_discounted_net_revenue, node_wept_final.

simple_2pair.description: 2 well pairs (4 wells), depth [50,55], LHS xy+depth, 2048 configs even-split over 15 geologies

hard_fulldepth.description: 6 well pairs (12 wells), depth [11,70] (capped per-geology at z_cutoff-1), LHS xy+depth, 2048 configs even-split over 15 geologies

highperf_cma.description: gated_seed42 AL workspace as-is: 3287 cases = 3031 CMA-multistart-elite/gated-panel + 256 LHS seed (7.8%), 12 wells, depth [50,55], 15 geologies. Optimizer-biased distribution - flag in writeups.
